---
title: "Aunt Charlotte's Stories of Bible History for the little ones"
year: 1875
slug: "Aunt_bible"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


#### This book is available online.

#### [Click here to reach the Internet Archive page forAunt Charlotte's stories of Bible history for the little onesfrom the Internet Archive](https://archive.org/details/auntcharlottess01yonggoog/page/n12/mode/2up).  

## Bonnie Schuster's biobibliography of Yonge reveals a whole range of alternate US titles for this book:

#### Young Folks' Bible History

#### Aunt Charlotte's Stories of Bible History for Younge disciples

#### Happy Sundays with the Bible and the Children

#### Captivating Bible Stories for Young People

#### Child's Bible Reader; Stories form the Old and New Testaments
